name: High-Intensity Interval Training (HIIT)
instructions: Alternating short periods of intense anaerobic exercise with less intense recovery periods.

name: Bodyweight Strength Circuit
instructions: Pushups, squats, lunges, and planks. 45 seconds of work, 15 seconds of rest per exercise.

name: Vinyasa Yoga Flow
instructions: Continuous movement from one yoga posture to another, syncing breath with movement.

name: Brisk Walking (Outdoor/Treadmill)
instructions: Walking at a brisk pace (around 3.5 to 4 mph).

name: Core Burner
instructions: Crunches, leg raises, Russian twists, and side planks. Continuous for the selected duration.
